------ NOTES ------

FEEDBACK

If there are errors in the bot, feel free to mention it! Feedback helps improve the bot. If the initial message, images, plot, or character isn't to your liking, save your comments and look for another bot that you like, it would be the logical thing to do. There's no need to say "I don't like it".

EXPLICIT CONTENT

This bot may include adult content. You can configure prompts to avoid it or tell the bot that you’re not comfortable with that.

BEHAVIOR DISCLAIMER

Did the bot give you an answer you don’t like? Before blaming me or saying the bot doesn’t work.

FIRST, rate its response with one star, make the bot give a new response and then reconsider your prompts and settings!

SECOND, check the settings of the bot and ask yourself, if the creator didn’t include that in the configuration, is it really the creator’s fault?

THIRD, still didn’t get it? Fine, look for another bot.
